untranslatable_reason: Signal requires sign-based regression model with empirical coefficient thresholds and hit-ratio confidence metrics that cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. The core mechanism (regression model fit, coefficient magnitude evaluation, and hit-ratio backtesting) is a meta-model that operates outside standard indicator-based rules. The specific THRESHOLD_NEEDED values and regression coefficients are not provided and cannot be reverse-engineered from price action alone.
translation_notes: This signal describes a machine-learning regression methodology rather than a rule-based technical pattern. It requires: (1) training a sign-based logistic/linear regression model on historical data, (2) evaluating coefficient magnitudes against an unknown threshold, (3) comparing empirical hit ratios against a 51.9% baseline. These are model hyperparameters that must be determined through walk-forward optimization, not static indicator thresholds. To implement, use a separate ML pipeline outside the backtest engine.
